audio.transcript: Today's AI engineering briefing. Item 1: Show HN: Sanbox, batteries included sandboxes for AI agents. Relevant to From Prompts to Harnesses. Matched From Prompts to Harnesses on: agent. Read it through that lens. Item 2: Show HN: LocalMask – local-first CLI that masks PII and secrets before LLMs. Relevant to Production Ops: Cost, Safety & Multi-Tenancy. Matched Production Ops: Cost, Safety & Multi-Tenancy on: pii. Read it through that lens. Item 3: Ollama vs. Llama.cpp – Quick Benchmark. Relevant to Model Efficiency & Compression. Matched Model Efficiency & Compression on: llama.cpp. Read it through that lens. Item 4: GPT-5.6-sol without hitting limits. Relevant to From Prompts to Harnesses. No strong keyword match; defaulted to foundations. Read it through that lens. Item 5: Microsoft joins Google in backing Go for AI agents — OpenAI and Anthropic lag. Relevant to From Prompts to Harnesses. Matched From Prompts to Harnesses on: agent. Read it through that lens. Item 6: The Amazon SES Alternative for AI Agents – MailKite. Relevant to From Prompts to Harnesses. Matched From Prompts to Harnesses on: agent. Read it through that lens.
